chapter_title.ar: باب تَقْدِيمِ النَّوَافِلِ وَ تَأْخِيرِهَا وَ قَضَائِهَا وَ صَلَاةِ الضُّحَى
chapter_title.en: Chapter 85 – Preceding the optional (Salāt) and delaying it, and its payback, and the Salāt at forenoon

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مجهول - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (15/421)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مجهول - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (15/421)
text: كَتَبْتُ إِلَى أَبِي الْحَسَنِ الرِّضَا ( عليه السلام ) يَكُونُ عَلَيَّ الصَّلَاةُ النَّافِلَةُ مَتَى أَقْضِيهَا فَكَتَبَ ( عليه السلام ) أَيَّةَ سَاعَةٍ شِئْتَ مِنْ لَيْلٍ أَوْ نَهَارٍ .
Muhammad Bin Yahya, from Muhammad Bin Al-Husayn, from Muhammad Bin Yahya Bin Habeeb who said,

en.hubeali: ‘I wrote to Abu Al-Hassan Al-Rezaasws, ‘There happen to be optional Salāts (outstanding) upon me, when shall I fulfil them?’ So heasws wrote: ‘Whichever time you so desire to, from a night or a day’.
en.sarwar: 17. Muhammad ibn Yahya has narrated from Muhammad ibn al-Husayn from Muhammad ibn Yahya ibn Habib who has said the following: “I once wrote to abu al-Hassan, al-Rida’, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, asking, ‘There is optional Salah (prayer) on me, when should I perform Qada’ (compensatory prayer for) such missed Salah (prayer)?’ He (the Imam) wrote to me in answer, ‘You can perform them whenever you like, during the day or night.’”
